contract.directive: Implement a zero-allocation memory pool for the runtime substrate
specifications: INPUT: Implement a zero-allocation memory pool for the runtime substrate
CONSTRAINT: AGPL3_COMPLIANCE → All code must be AGPL-3.0 licensed
CONSTRAINT: GENESIS_SEAL → T0 ledger must match cryptographic seal
CONSTRAINT: ZERO_ALLOCATION → Hot paths must avoid heap allocation
CONSTRAINT: DOMAIN_ISOLATION → D0 core cannot be mutated by D1 overlay
